faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about how LuckBox works

items.title: What exactly is LuckBox?
items.description: LuckBox is your AI-powered life guidance platform that combines Eastern wisdom with modern technology. Think of it as having a personal fortune advisor available 24/7, providing insights for your career, relationships, and life decisions using both ancient Eastern philosophy and advanced AI analysis.

items.title: How does LuckBox generate accurate readings?
items.description: Our system uses a sophisticated AI model trained on thousands of traditional Eastern astrology cases and modern data. When you input your birth information, our AI analyzes your unique birth chart using traditional Eastern methods, then combines this with modern analytical techniques to provide personalized insights and predictions.

items.title: How reliable are the predictions?
items.description: LuckBox achieves high accuracy through a dual-validation approach: we combine time-tested Eastern astrology principles with AI pattern recognition. Our system continuously learns from user feedback and outcomes, allowing it to refine and improve its predictions over time. We also provide transparency by explaining the reasoning behind each prediction.

items.title: What makes LuckBox different from traditional fortune telling?
items.description: Unlike traditional fortune telling, LuckBox offers objective, data-driven insights backed by AI analysis. We don't just tell you what might happen - we provide actionable guidance based on both Eastern wisdom and modern analytical methods. Plus, you can access your readings anytime, track predictions over time, and receive updates as circumstances change.
